modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to remove out-of-office message on VoIP phone.

full_description_text:  
User is trying to change the auto-greeting on their VoIP phone.  
They are specifically looking to remove the out-of-office message.  
The phone number associated with the issue is 658-xxxx.  
User is experiencing difficulty in completing this task.
